channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: The Beths @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-08-12 02:00 — The Beths at San Jose Civic. The Beths and Beach Bunny are both rising indie pop acts with strong live reputations, making this a must-see show.

item.title: Little Feat @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-08-11 03:00 — Little Feat at Fox Theater - Oakland. Little Feat's farewell tour is a significant event for fans of classic rock, offering a nostalgic experience.

item.title: ZAYN @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-03 03:00 — ZAYN at Chase Center. ZAYN's tour is highly anticipated, as he has a strong following and a reputation for captivating live shows.

item.title: Lily Allen @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-24 03:00 — Lily Allen at Chase Center. Lily Allen's performance promises a unique blend of pop and storytelling, appealing to her dedicated fanbase.

item.title: i-dle @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-22 03:00 — i-dle at Oakland Arena. i-dle's world tour showcases a popular K-pop group known for their energetic performances and strong fanbase.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz are known for their innovative live shows, making this tour a highly anticipated event.

item.title: Bonnie Raitt @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-11 03:00 — Bonnie Raitt at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Bonnie Raitt's live performance is a rare treat, showcasing her legendary status in the music industry.

item.title: Passion Pit @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-08-17 02:30 — Passion Pit at Fox Theater - Oakland. Passion Pit's tour revives their energetic sound, appealing to fans of indie electronic music.

item.title: Bleachers @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-18 01:30 — Bleachers at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jon Batiste's live show is expected to be a vibrant celebration of music, appealing to a wide audience.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's tour is a chance to see a beloved artist known for his laid-back vibe and engaging performances.

item.title: The Neighbourhood @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — The Neighbourhood at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Neighbourhood's tour is a great opportunity to catch a popular alt-rock band known for their atmospheric sound.

item.title: Eagles of Death Metal @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Eagles of Death Metal at The Fillmore. Eagles of Death Metal bring a high-energy rock experience, appealing to fans of the genre.

item.title: Social Distortion @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-30 02:00 — Social Distortion at Fox Theater - Oakland. Social Distortion's tour is a chance to see a legendary punk band with a dedicated following.

item.title: Rise Against @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-23 02:00 — Rise Against at The Masonic. Rise Against's show promises a powerful punk rock experience, resonating with their passionate fanbase.

item.title: Sombr @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:30 — Sombr at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-16 02:30 → 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: Mon Laferte @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-07 04:00 — Mon Laferte at SAP Center at San Jose.
